user.title: Add YouTube channel group
user.description: Create a group of YouTube channels (e.g. 'Gaming', 'Technology') to monitor for live streams.

data_description.group_name: A name for this group, used as the device name in Home Assistant.
data_description.channel_handles: Add one or more channel handles, e.g. @home_assistant

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to YouTube. Please try again later.
error.channel_not_found: One or more channels were not found on YouTube. Check the handles and try again (handles are case-sensitive).
error.no_channels: Add at least one channel handle.

abort.already_configured: A group with this name is already configured.

init.title: Edit channels in this group
init.description: Add or remove channel handles in this group.

data_description.channel_handles: Add one or more channel handles, e.g. @home_assistant

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to YouTube. Please try again later.
error.channel_not_found: One or more channels were not found on YouTube. Check the handles and try again (handles are case-sensitive).
error.no_channels: Add at least one channel handle.
